title: Teens Sue Musk's xAI Claiming Grok Created Sexually Explicit Images Of Them
summary_full: Elon Musk promoted the ability of xAI's Grok chatbot to create "spicy" content, the lawsuit claims.
summary_public: Elon Musk promoted the ability of xAI's Grok chatbot to create "spicy" content, the lawsuit claims.
